subject: Holiday Celebration reconciliation - DRAFT for Dec 8 Council
body:
Pastor David,

Before the Dec 8 Council meeting, here is the reconciled status of the Holiday Celebration. This is a DRAFT for review - not yet sent to Council.

[TABLE: Money in vs Money out to be filled]

Matt

subject: Reconciliation - final numbers
body: Pastor David - final numbers for Council: Received $4,850. Phantom $750. Obligations $5,955. Gap ~$1,105.

subject: About the $5,600
body: Frank - I want to clarify: the $5,600 you quoted includes 6 unfulfilled pledges.

subject: Ring camera password
body: Sofia - please remind me to update the Ring password. Old one is compromised.

subject: Christmas travel
body: Lupe - I want to come Dec 24 evening. Aunt Carmen's cardiology results?

subject: Spring flight
body: Yes let's book the Southwest flight. April dates flexible.

subject: Final headcount
body: Elena - final headcount 234. Any menu adjustment needed?

subject: Sunday chili
body: Rosa - Sunday chili confirmed. Bringing extra masa this time.

subject: Newsletter blurb
body: Wellness booth blurb: 'Rest, tea, and gentle conversation. Come find peace.'

subject: Reconciliation coffee
body: Frank - let's meet Tuesday 10 AM after my clinic shift. Bring your ledger.

subject: Wellness supplies
body: David - I'm covering my own herbal preparations. $400 line will fund screening supplies + gift bags.

subject: Aloe followup
body: Dolores - so glad. Come by for a fresh cut next time.

subject: Will review
body: Lorena - let's book the annual review. Free Nov 8 or Nov 15.

subject: Backyard cam alert
body: Sofia - the backyard cam pinged me last night. Just a stray cat but wanted to flag.

subject: Rosemary tincture
body: Consuelo - Thursday 3 PM. Bring the bottle.

subject: Vanguard beneficiary
body: Carlos - Sofia says beneficiary split 50/50 confirmed. All squared away.

subject: Casa Flores 2027
body: Casa Flores - just planning. Will you be available Advent 2027?

subject: Reconciliation report attach
body: Attaching the reconciliation report PDF. See you Monday morning.

subject: Council reveal draft
body: Frank - draft I'm bringing Council. Please read before Monday morning coffee.

subject: Rescheduling
body: Isabel - need to reschedule Friday. Family emergency. Can we do Saturday?

subject: Wellness room sign
body: Jamie - Option 2 with the herbs at the border is my favorite. Print in navy.
